sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6731" key="a)na/kliqron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάκλιθρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">gloss on </abbr> <sense id="n6731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fulcrum;</tr_> of the back of Cassiepeia's chair, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
